package rulefixtures

// scenario for goroutine_captures_loop_variable: `for _, v := range items { go func() { use(v) }() }` without rebinding `v` inside the loop body (pre-Go 1.22)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario713Positive(items []string) {
	for _, item := range items {
		go func() { _ = item }()
	}
}
